description: A section navigation header that displays the current section's title as a link alongside a mobile off-canvas menu toggle button.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Section title wrapper for a typical department section.

stories.name: LongTitle
stories.description: Section title wrapper with a long section name.

props.sectionTitle: School of Chemical, Materials and Biological Engineering

stories.name: UndergraduateStudy
stories.description: Section title wrapper for the undergraduate study section.

notes: The menu button always has the same text 'Menu', the same aria attributes, and the same data-toggle value 'left-off-canvas-menu' — these are hardcoded. The hreflang attribute on the anchor is always 'en' and should be hardcoded. The .section-title selector appears on a separate related element (div.field-content.section-title.row) used for the off-canvas panel.
htmlExamples:
Management School

Menu

Undergraduate study

Menu
